title: Secrets of A Side Chick
overview: He's beautiful, tall, and chocolate with gray eyes... and he's worth fighting for. Omari is a hard-working man from the Southside of Chicago. He's been committed to Aeysha for years but is falling for his side chick, Simone, who is determined to finally win her man, by any means.
